data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of embedded calendar invites, but there is no evidence provided that confirms their implementation or existence. The linked use case mentions the need for embedded calendar invites, yet no concrete API reads or persisted state checks were conducted to verify this requirement. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the expected result was not met.
gaps: No evidence of embedded calendar invites (.ics files) being implemented or available.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for embedded calendar invites
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify the existence and functionality of embedded calendar invites (.ics files) in the API response.
